marketing.heroSubheadline: Run OpenClaw remotely without the DevOps headache. Focus on your agents—we'll handle the infrastructure.
marketing.trustBadge: Launch pricing locked in for early users
benefitBullets: Secure by default with managed SSL
marketing.snapshotNoteBody: Synclaw keeps your OpenClaw dashboard online, monitored, and updated—so you don't have to.
marketing.productInActionSubtitle: Monitor and control your OpenClaw agents from anywhere

visualCards.title: Activity Dashboard
visualCards.caption: Monitor agent activity, task progress, and system health from one clean interface.

visualCards.title: Cost Monitoring
visualCards.caption: See exactly what you're spending on OpenClaw at a glance. Alerts keep you informed.

visualCards.title: Template Library
visualCards.caption: Jumpstart your workflows with pre-built agent templates. Configure once, deploy in seconds.

marketing.operatorFlowBody: Connect your OpenClaw instance to Synclaw with one click. We handle the servers, SSL, monitoring, and updates—giving you a reliable dashboard for remote control.
marketing.whyBody: OpenClaw is powerful, but running it on a remote server shouldn't feel like rocket science. Think of us as your managed cloud dashboard. You keep full control of your OpenClaw agents—we give you a clean, reliable way to run, monitor, and manage them from anywhere.
whyBullets: One-click fs-bridge setup with automatic configuration
Real-time cost monitoring with smart alerts
Secure by default: encrypted connections, managed SSL

segmentCards.title: Solo Operators
segmentCards.text: Launch your first agents without managing servers. Focus on building—Synclaw handles the infrastructure.

segmentCards.title: Small Teams
segmentCards.text: Scale production workloads with analytics dashboards, priority support, and advanced cost monitoring.

segmentCards.title: Technical Users
segmentCards.text: Keep full control of your codebase with the free self-host option, or upgrade for managed infrastructure.

marketing.pricingHeadline: Launch prices locked in for early users
marketing.trialSummary: Technical users who want full control. Full codebase, community support, self-managed infrastructure.
marketing.starterSummary: Solo operators launching their first agents. Managed infra, templates, up to 3 agents, email support.
marketing.proSummary: Small teams scaling production workloads. Everything in Starter + up to 10 agents, analytics dashboards, priority support, advanced cost monitoring.
marketing.finalCtaHeadline: Join the beta and get early access to Synclaw
marketing.finalCtaBody: Launch pricing locked in for your first 12 months. Start your free trial today.

auth.footerNote: Secure authentication powered by Convex Auth

seo.titleDefault: Synclaw: AI Agent Mission Control for Everyone
seo.descriptionDefault: Manage AI agents from anywhere with Synclaw. The simple cloud dashboard for remote monitoring and control—no coding required. Plans from $9.99/mo.
